role_summary: the financial controller ensures accurate financial reporting, robust internal controls, and  compliance with accounting standards and laws.
responsibilities: • oversee accounting records and financial statements   • ensure compliance with ind as / ifrs and statutory requirements   • manage audits and liaison with statutory auditors   • implement and monitor internal financial controls   • oversee closing processes and reporting timelines   • support management with financial insights an d risk analysis
qualifications: • ca with strong financial reporting background   • expertise in accounting standards and controls   • high attention to detail and governance focus
